name: EQUITY ONE, INC. v. Charmaine Colon McCOULLUM. Petition of Charmaine Prater

parties: EQUITY ONE, INC. v. Charmaine Colon McCOULLUM. Petition of Charmaine Prater.

opinions.text:
ORDER
PER CURIAM.
AND NOW, this 11th day of August, 2010, the “Application for Leave to File an Appeal from Nov. 23, 2009 Order of the Court of Common Pleas” is DENIED.
opinions.author: PER CURIAM.

EQUITY ONE, INC. v. Charmaine Colon McCOULLUM. Petition of Charmaine Prater.
